ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gestures" (
  "gesture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gesture recording */,
  "gesture_name" TEXT /* Name or label of the gesture */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant performing the gesture */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the recording session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device used for recording */,
  "gesture_category" TEXT /* Category of the gesture (e.g., alphabetic, numeric) */,
  "gesture_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the gesture (e.g., simple, moderate, complex) */,
  "temporality" TEXT /* Temporality of the gesture (e.g., Static, Dynamic) */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "frame_count" INTEGER /* Number of frames in the gesture sequence */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the gesture recording */,
  "gesture_duration" REAL /* Duration of the gesture in seconds */,
  "gesture_velocity" REAL /* Average velocity of the gesture */,
  "gesture_acceleration" REAL /* Average acceleration of the gesture */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the gesture recognition */,
  "data_encryption_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is encrypted */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations by researchers */,
  "dist_thumb_tip_pinky_tip" REAL /* Distance between thumb tip and pinky tip */,
  "dist_thumb_tip_index_tip" REAL /* Distance between thumb tip and index tip */,
  "dist_index_tip_middle_tip" REAL /* Distance between index tip and middle tip */,
  "dist_middle_tip_ring_tip" REAL /* Distance between middle tip and ring tip */,
  "dist_ring_tip_pinky_tip" REAL /* Distance between ring tip and pinky tip */,
  "dist_thumb_proximal_joint_thumb_tip" REAL /* Distance between thumb proximal joint and thumb tip */,
  "dist_index_knuckle_index_tip" REAL /* Distance between index knuckle and index tip */,
  "dist_middle_knuckle_middle_tip" REAL /* Distance between middle knuckle and middle tip */,
  "dist_ring_knuckle_ring_tip" REAL /* Distance between ring knuckle and ring tip */,
  "dist_pinky_knuckle_pinky_tip" REAL /* Distance between pinky knuckle and pinky tip */,
  "dist_palm_thumb_distal_joint" REAL /* Distance between palm and thumb distal joint */,
  "dist_palm_index_middle_joint" REAL /* Distance between palm and index middle joint */,
  "dist_palm_middle_middle_joint" REAL /* Distance between palm and middle middle joint */,
  "dist_palm_ring_middle_joint" REAL /* Distance between palm and ring middle joint */,
  "dist_palm_pinky_middle_joint" REAL /* Distance between palm and pinky middle joint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gesture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gestures_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "hand_dominance" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the participant (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "participant_group" TEXT /* Group to which the participant belongs (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has given consent */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details of the participant (encrypted) */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of sessions completed by the participant */,
  "last_session_date" TEXT /* Date of the last session completed by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)
